{{Quote|You've fought against it, you know its weaknesses, and more importantly, you know what a killer it can be. Men, meet the newest addition to the Stormtrooper Corps.|TK-342, referring to the [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|Dwarf Spider Droid]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''TK-342''' was a [[Stormtrooper Commander/Legends|stormtrooper commander]] present at the [[Battle of Ghorman|pacification]] of [[Ghorman/Legends|Ghorman]].
